name: EOTEC
description: EOTEC is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hermiston, OR. There are 5 indoor concrete courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and lights. You can’t reserve the courts.
fees: Fee required — $5 use fee per day.

name: Flying Horse
description:
Flying Horse is a private outdoor court to play pickleball in Milton-Freewater. This is a dedicated acrylic court with a permanent net and lines. Players have access to restrooms. Reservations are not available. The court is surrounded by a 6 foot fence with privacy slats to reduce the effect of the wind during play.  Hooks attached to fence are available for hanging bags, and metal benches are provide.
Link to video showing ball performance on acrylic surface: https://u.pcloud.link/publink/show?code=XZXuXm5Zc6oXGyr51eBknkBiD5vPshsYVDMX

name: Fraudulent Fields
description: This court does not exist and is exists only for testing. It's not a pickleball court. Please do not come here expecting to play pickleball.

name: Good Shepherd Pickleball Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Good Shepherd Pickleball Complex in Hermiston, OR! There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Reservations are not available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: The NET Sports Center
description: The NET Sports Center is a place to play pickleball in Pendleton, OR. There are 6 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts cannot be reserved. Amenities include restrooms and water.
fees: Fee required — $10 per non member on open play days

name: West Park Elementary School
description: West Park Elementary School is a place to play pickleball in Hermiston, OR. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.
